title: Feature toggle index system — numbered list at top of template
description: Design a numbered feature toggle index at the top of each SOW template. Items in the doc are tagged with the index number. During interview, toggles are set to include/exclude. The index is removed from the final delivered doc. This makes it easy to add/edit available options. Damien's idea — discuss when starting component breakdown phase.

title: Iconik Up and Running — Template Legal Review
description: Review Iconik U&R for legal/contractual concerns: liability language, exclusions, acceptance terms.
close_reason: Legal review completed. MSA and Iconik SOW template reviewed. Fixed typo (netoworking→networking), updated EU Data Protection ref from Directive 95/46/EC to GDPR (EU) 2016/679. Acceptance criteria, liability caps, and support terms validated. Identified follow-up items tracked separately.

title: MSA — Dhub EULA status review
description: Dhub EULA is listed as 'in progress' in the MSA since 2019. Review whether it should be completed, removed, or updated with a current status note.

title: MSA — Clarify 'fees paid' in liability cap for reseller model
description: Section 9.2 caps liability at 'total fees paid by Client to North Shore.' In the reseller model, fees flow through the reseller, not directly from client. Clarify that 'fees paid' means fees received by NSA from the reseller to avoid ambiguity in disputes.

title: Exhibit 2 Change Order — legal/professional review
description: Review Exhibit 2 Change Order language across all SOW templates for professionalism and legal protection. Standardized language shared across all templates.
close_reason: Exhibit 2 Change Order reviewed as part of MSA/SOW legal review. Language is professional and legally sound. CO process well-structured with clear escalation and incorporation terms.

title: Remove init skill, make codemap the onboarding entry point, integrate codemap auto-updates into scope/implement
close_reason: Completed: init removed, codemap promoted as entry point, implement reads/updates CODEMAP.yaml

Currently the MSA exclusions heavily reference CatDV Worker Node, Akomi MySQL, Akomi video playback, etc. which are irrelevant to Iconik engagements. Also update document date from 12-2019 to current.

title: SOW Template — LLM-ready tagging and conditional section markup
description: Revise the Iconik Up and Running SOW template with consistent, well-documented tagging for LLM-driven interview and fill-out process. Currently uses mixed formats (#placeholder for string replacement, XML-style tags for conditional sections). Standardize the markup system and document the tag conventions so an LLM skill can programmatically generate SOWs.
close_reason: Options index populated (12 options + global variables tables). All sub-tags added: CLOUD_ARCHIVE, SSO, EDIT_PROXY, VANTAGE within DEPLOY_OPTIONS; ARCHIVE_WF, REVIEW_WF, REMOTE_EDIT, CAMERA_INGEST, GAMEDAY within CUSTOM_WORKFLOWS; ADDL_TRAINING, SUPPORT/SUPPORT_DECLINED standalone. GAMEDAY bundle spans AWE section, CUSTOM_WORKFLOWS, and Exhibit 1 checklist.
